details.test: Task 1: Add highest-rated ergonomic office chair under $250 to cart
Task 2: Request quote for cheapest search result product
Task 3: Create cart with exactly 3 different products (qty 4 each)
Task 4: Save a search result product to saved items
Task 5: Compare two category products and add best one (qty 2) to cart
Task 6: Add two filtered products (ergonomic, free shipping, 4+ stars) to cart
Task 7: Quick order by SKU, then proceed to order summary with invoice payment
Task 8: Schedule a demo request for a selected product
